x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Lump-Sum / Full Payment Modality: Entire credit amount is disbursed or repaid in a single payment.

Comment:
Example: One-time loan disbursement or full repayment at maturity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Installment / Partial Payment Modality: Credit is repaid or disbursed in multiple scheduled installments.

Comment:
Example: Monthly EMI for a personal loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Flexible Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
On-Demand / Flexible Payment Modality: Payments occur as requested by the borrower or lender.

Comment:
Example: Revolving credit where the borrower draws and repays as needed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditional / Triggered Payment Modality: Payment occurs only if certain conditions are satisfied.

Comment:
Example: Overdraft funds released only if account balance is insufficient.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Proportional Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Proportional / Percentage-Based Payment Modality: Payment amount is calculated as a percentage of a reference value.

Comment:
Example: Repayment of 10% of outstanding balance monthly.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Threshold / Limit-Based Payment Modality: Payments are subject to maximum or minimum limits.

Comment:
Example: Monthly repayment capped at €500 regardless of balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Credit Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Event-Based / Promotional Payment Modality: Payments are executed based on specific events or promotions.

Comment:
Example: Bonus repayment applied after account milestone or promotional period.
